title: China will implement new online food delivery regulations on June 1, requiring platforms to regularly verify businesses' identities, locations, and licenses (Nikkei Asia)
summary: Nikkei Asia : China will implement new online food delivery regulations on June 1, requiring platforms to regularly verify businesses' identities, locations, and licenses   —  BEIJING/SHANGHAI — The Chinese government will tighten a clampdown on food delivery companies from June, conducting unannounced inspections …
